name: Git
description: Baseline governance rules for common git operations.

rules.name: Git Read Operations
rules.description: Read-only git commands stay low risk.

rules.name: Git Mutation Operations
rules.description: Merges, rebases, commits, and tags require approval.

rules.name: Git Force Push
rules.description: Force pushes are treated as high risk.

rules.name: Wrap Hard Reset
rules.description: Force hard resets into wrapper mode.
